case_title: BATIA GEORGE VS. UNITED AIR LINES, INC.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-31-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-31-2009 BY CURTIS KARNOW. THIS MATTER COMES BEFORE THE COURT ON THIS DATE OF A SMALL CLAIMS TRIAL. JUDGE KARNOW, CLERK VEGAS, PLAINTIFF , REPRESENTAITVE FOR UNITED AIRLINES, ARE PRESENT IN COURT. COURT AND PARTIES DISCUSS THE MATTER OFF OF THE RECORD. NO EXHIBITS ARE MARKED OR PRESENTED. THE JUDGE RULES INFAVOR OF THE PLAINTIFF AND AGAINST THE DEFENDANT IN THE AMOUNT OF $1130.00. ENFORSMENT OF THE JUDGMENT IS AUTOMATICALLY POSTPONED FOR THIRTY (30) DAYS.
SMALL CLAIMS CLAIM CALENDAR OF AUG-25-2009 TRANSFERRED TO DEPT. 206 FOR REASSIGNMENT - PARTIES WOULD NOT STIPULATE TO A JUDGE PRO TEM.
